criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on major app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads or installs from major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: User Reviews
criteria.description: Number and sentiment of user reviews on major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: App Features
criteria.description: Unique and innovative features offered by the app, particularly those powered by AI.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, tech reviews

criteria.name: UI/UX Design
criteria.description: Quality and user-friendliness of the app's user interface and user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, design critiques

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates, indicating ongoing development and support.
criteria.sources: App store update history, developer blogs

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance of the app across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App store listings, user reviews, developer specifications

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: App's handling of user data, privacy policies, and security features.
criteria.sources: Privacy policies, security audits, user reviews
